europe={
  western_europe={
    scandinavian_region={
      svealand_area={
        uppland_province={ stockholm norrtalje uppsala }
      }
    }
  }
  eastern_europe={
    alpha_region={
      alpha_area={
        alpha_province={ alpha }
      }
    }
  }
}
asia={
  east_asia={
    beta_region={
      beta_area={
        beta_province={ beta }
      }
    }
  }
}
